description: Triggers for startup validation, PMF assessment, growth strategy, and unit economics

queries.query: Validate my startup idea — am I building something people want?
Help me assess if we have product-market fit yet
Calculate our unit economics — CAC, LTV, payback period
Build a growth strategy for our pre-seed B2B startup
We're at $50K MRR — what are the levers to reach $500K?
Should we focus on growth or profitability at our current stage?
Help me size the market and validate the TAM/SAM/SOM for my startup
Analyze our metrics: 30% MoM growth, 18% churn, NPS 42 — what should we do?
Should we add a sales team or stay PLG at our current growth rate?
Build a 12-month growth roadmap for our early-stage startup
Create a 1-page product strategy canvas for our product
Build an ABX enterprise marketing campaign
Set up an Opportunity Solution Tree for our retention problem
Write an executive resume for a founder moving to a new startup
Create a system architecture for our startup's MVP
Build a McKinsey-style structured analysis for our pricing decision
Help me build an operating rhythm for my 5-person product team
Create a comprehensive storytelling narrative for our investor pitch
Research the competitive landscape for our industry
Help me set up evals for our AI-native product feature
